## Tags
storage, memory, bytes, servers, backup, timemachine, rotate, synchronize, synchronise, refresh, reconnect, transfer, data, security, upload, save, remote, safety

## Categories
arrows, files

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/cloud-backup)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::CloudBackup;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        CloudBackup { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
